title: REmodpackHOU
description: 我喜欢挖土，也喜欢整天整夜地做手工，哦耶！我真的很喜欢做手工，挖土的时候我也做手工，做手工的时候我也挖土！
body:
This modpack runs on the Fabric platform, integrating a carefully curated selection of mods to enhance both performance and gameplay. Key mods include Sodium and Lithium, which significantly boost client performance by optimizing rendering and game logic. For those who enjoy visual enhancements, Iris ensures seamless shader compatibility, allowing you to experience breathtaking graphics without compromising on performance.

In addition to visual and performance improvements, this pack also focuses on auditory experiences. The Simple Voice Chat mod introduces real-time voice communication, making it easier to coordinate with friends and fellow players. To complement this, Improved Sound Physics brings a more immersive sound environment, adding depth and realism to every block-breaking, mob-chasing, and world-exploring adventure.

This modpack was designed with a private S2 server in mind, providing a balanced mix of enhancements that cater to both solo and multiplayer experiences. Whether you're looking to push the limits of Minecraft's visuals, enjoy smoother gameplay, or communicate effectively with your friends, this pack has you covered.

Features:

Performance Optimization: Sodium and Lithium mods for a smoother and more efficient Minecraft experience.
Shader Compatibility: Iris mod for stunning visual effects and shader support.
Enhanced Audio: Simple Voice Chat for easy in-game communication and Improved Sound Physics for a more immersive soundscape.
Dive into a richer, more polished Minecraft experience with this Fabric-based modpack, tailored to elevate your adventures on our private S2 server.

Feel free to adjust the pack or expand it further based on your specific needs!
